sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26721" key="dieuhmere/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διευημερέω</orth>, <sense id="n26721.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">enjoy good success throughout,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Al.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">N.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
